title: Kitchen Sink Caddy Organizer - Sponge Holder and Organiser (Silver)
features: Versatile Kitchen Caddy: This versatile product gives an organized look to your kitchen sink area. Use it as a sink area organizer to keep any of your cleaning stuff like your dish scrubbers, dish sponge, dish brushes and washing up liquids in one place. With a strong hanging bar, it would not just work as a drying rack, but it will also function as sink organiser. Available in Black and Silver.

Durable and Rust-free: Investing in this high quality SUS304 Stainless steel product will make a standout addition to your kitchen for many years to come. This rust-free and sturdy washing up caddy for the sink area promises long lasting usage. Even continuous dripping of liquid on it would not affect its durability as it comes with a drip tray. You will not experience any sign of rusting for a longer period.

Ultimate Drying Rack: With the functionality of a drying rack, it goes great in both kitchen sink area and washroom. Whatever liquid drips over it, it would simply pass into the drip tray underneath and all your contents would stay odor-free and dry all day long.

Handy and Practical: This cleaning caddy is available in Size: 21x11x17cm which is quite handy and practical to use. Wet scrubbers, brushes or sponges give a great and unhygienic look to your kitchen. Placing all such items in one place in an organized manner is the best solution. This kitchen tidy caddy is available in a size that is easy to handle. It can easily be placed anywhere you want. Designed with a dripping tray and a hanging bar over it, you can hang any wet dish cloth over it.

Anti-Slip Product: Our washing caddy not just helps you in keeping your brushes and sponges organized, it also makes sure that its non-slip base keeps it firmly at its place without budging away. No matter how wet the area is, its non-slip material keeps it fixed all the time and you can use it in a fuss-free way.
description: Are you looking for a kitchen washing up organizer to keep your house hold cleaning supplies in an organized and space saving way? Give a try to our sink caddy holder. Made with sturdy material, this washing caddy is one of the best available in the market. Made from High quality SUS304 Stainless steel, this product is designed to keep all your sponge cleaners and dishwashers in a single place without dripping any of the filthy water that may easily spoil the utensils or the space around. High-Quality Product: Manufactured with strong and sturdy high quality SUS304 Stainless steel, this stainless steel product is welded to the perfection with smooth finish. You can safely and freely use it without any fear of scratch or score. Colour Availability: Our sink caddy sponge holder is available in two elegant shades i.e. silver and black. Made up of rust-free stainless steel, this product ensures long lasting usage plus both colours blend beautifully with the kitchen interior . Towel Bar and Dripping Tray: This unique feature is designed to give you dry dish rag every time. The towel bar on it lets you hang your kitchen or dish rag after each use. The water dripping from the rag gets stored in the drip tray that can easily be removed later on. Just one click away!
